channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: TikTok returns to Apple and Google app stores in the US
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — TikTok has returned to the app stores of Apple and Google in the U.S., after President Donald Trump delayed the enforcement of a TikTok ban. TikTok, which is operated by Chinese technology firm ByteDance, was removed from Apple and Google’s app stores on Jan.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Astro Bot Gets Free Content Update with New Levels and PS5 Pro Upgrade - Game Updates
item.description: Team Asobi releases a free content update for Astro Bot, adding five new levels starting today, with more to come weekly until March 13. A 'constant best resolution' 60FPS mode is also available for PS5 Pro users.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Snowflake announces preview of Cortex Agent APIs to power enterprise data intelligence
item.description: Snowflake on Wednesday announced the public preview of Cortex Agents, a set of APIs built on top of the Snowflake Intelligence platform, a low-code offering that was first launched in November at Build, the company’s annual developer conference.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Top 20 apps tracking you every day
item.description: The apps collecting the most data about you are among the most widely used. Kurt the CyberGuy takes a look at 20 of these apps and how you can protect personal information.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Latino workers working to overcome a technological divide brought on by automation, AI
item.description: As jobs become more reliant on technology some Latino workers can be left behind due to a lack of digital skills exacerbated by a lack of accessibility.
item.dc:creator: FERNANDA FIGUEROA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Identify any mystery caller for free with this phone number lookup tool
item.description: The TruePeopleSearch.com website works for landline and cellphone numbers, allowing you to do a reverse phone lookup for any type of phone number.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amazon to pay nearly $4M to settle lawsuit alleging it took tips from drivers
item.description: Amazon has agreed to pay nearly $4 million to settle charges that the e-commerce company subsidized its labor costs by taking tips its delivery drivers received from customers, District of Columbia Attorney General Brian L. Schwalb said Friday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
